channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump admits World Cup tickets are too expensive—days after Infantino insisted they were ‘market rate’ for America
item.description: "I wouldn't pay it either, to be honest," the president said.

item.title: ‘Blue dot fever’ plagues musicians like Post Malone, Meghan Trainor, and Zayn as a growing list of artists cancel tours due to lagging ticket sales
item.description: The industry epidemic is named after the blue dots that represent unsold seats on Ticketmaster’s website.

item.title: The AI job apocalypse is ‘unhelpful marketing, bad economics and worse history,’ a16z says
item.description: So, then, why are so many historians afraid?

item.title: eBay bans GameStop CEO’s account after he started listing store signs and old carpets to fund his $56 billion offer to buy the marketplace
item.description: Michael Burry dumped his GameStop shares over the eBay dealing, warning "never confuse debt for creativity.”
